author: MV
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Connects Obsidian to Claude Code with configurable page tracking, session-aware terminals, MCP tools, editable diffs, and optional upstream compatibility.

manifest.author: MV
manifest.description: Connects local vaults to Claude Code with page tracking, session-aware terminals, MCP tools, editable diffs, and optional upstream compatibility.
manifest.name: Mv obcc

name: Mv obcc

releases.author: aitingtingya
releases.description:
Release version 0.3.6 - 解决官方审查错误

### Changes
- Rename plugin to Mv obcc
- Remove Obsidian from description in manifest.json
- Add MIT License
- Add bilingual README.md
- Fix CSS inline style assignments
- Fix unsupported leaf deferred loading APIs for older versions
- Fix HTML heading elements in settings

releases.author: aitingtingya
releases.description:
Release version 0.3.5 - 官方市场入库版

### Changes
- Rename plugin to Mv obcc to resolve uppercase warning
- Remove Obsidian from description in manifest.json
- Add MIT License
- Add bilingual README.md with manual release installation guide
